title: Vasudevanallur Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Vasudevanallur with a Z-Score of +3.11. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heat wave has led to a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), with a value of 9.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 77%, which can exacerbate the feeling of heat. 
 The wind speed is very low, at 0.6 km/h, which can worsen the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
